name: com.bcsv.unity
description: Fast, compact binary format for streaming time-series data. Row-by-row I/O with LZ4 compression, Zero-Order Hold encoding, and crash resilience. P/Invoke bindings to the native bcsv_c_api library.

samples.description: BcsvRecorder component for recording Unity data (transforms, rigidbodies) and a cross-platform API example.
